steps.title: Map the passage sequence
steps.content: The question asks for the overall structure, so track the order of ideas. The passage first introduces the Pueblo of Pojoaque's Poeh Cultural Center and explains that it uses traditional knowledge to present Pojoaque history and culture. It then adds that the Tohono O'odham Nation uses a similar strategy in its cultural center.

steps.title: Compare the two halves
steps.content: After presenting those two Indigenous-led centers, the passage shifts to a contrast with museums that are not Indigenous-led. Choice A invents an early-versus-newer sequence, Choice C invents one shared artifact set, and Choice D invents visitor-response speculation. Choice B captures the two tribal centers followed by the comparison with non-Indigenous institutions. The answer is B.
